column1: Mr Smith (to fix) his car yesterday morning.
His wife (to water) her lovely flowers yesterday.
I (not to go) to the cinema tomorrow.
Our football team (to win) many games next year.
Who (to ring) you up an hour ago?
It (to take) you long to find his house yesterday.
One of her brothers (to make) a tour of Europe last summer.
She (to become) Queen of England almost 70 years ago.
My grandmother (not to work). She is on pension.
There ___ a lot of apples in the fridge.
